name: com.fablerlabs/x402-tools
title: Fabler x402 Tools
description: Paid agent tools (secret scanning, agent-config and diff-security audits, OG rendering) billed per call over x402 on Base, plus a free product catalog.

environmentVariables.name: X402_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the x402 API base URL (default https://x402.fablerlabs.com)

environmentVariables.name: X402_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your own EVM wallet private key, used only to auto-pay x402 402 challenges via the optional x402-fetch + viem packages (npm install x402-fetch viem alongside this server). Never sent to Fabler Labs, never logged. Omit to receive the raw 402 challenge instead of automatic payment.
